news_items.title: Netherlands lineup vs. Morocco: Predicted XI for 2026 World Cup clash including double fitness boost - Sports Mole
news_items.text:
Netherlands lineup vs. Morocco: Predicted XI for 2026 World Cup clash including double fitness boost - Sports Mole

Menu

World Cup

Netherlands

Monterrey Stadium

Morocco

# Netherlands lineup vs. Morocco: Predicted XI for 2026 World Cup clash including double fitness boost

By Matt Law| 27 Jun 2026 18:07, Last updated: 27 Jun 2026 18:08

© Iconsport / SUSA

Netherlands will have Denzel Dumfries and Brian Brobbey available for Monday's last-32 contest at the 2026 World Cup against Morocco.

There had been suggestions that Dumfries and Brobbey were carrying slight knocks, making them potential doubts for Netherlands, but the pair have been passed fit.

Micky van de Ven is set to return to the starting team at left-back, with Nathan Ake dropping out in potentially the only change from the team that started against Tunisia.

Brobbey is expected to continue through the middle for Koeman's team, with Memphis Depay, Justin Kluivert and Crysencio Summerville on the bench.

Netherlands' midfield has been a strong point this summer, with Frenkie de Jong impressive, and the Barcelona midfielder will again feature in the XI on Monday.

There will also be spots in the side for Liverpool trio

# Netherlands lineup vs. Morocco: Predicted XI for 2026 World Cup clash including double fitness boost

By Matt Law| 27 Jun 2026 18:07, Last updated: 27 Jun 2026 18:08

© Iconsport / SUSA

Netherlands will have Denzel Dumfries and Brian Brobbey available for Monday's last-32 contest at the 2026 World Cup against Morocco.

There had been suggestions that Dumfries and Brobbey were carrying slight knocks, making them potential doubts for Netherlands, but the pair have been passed fit.

Micky van de Ven is set to return to the starting team at left-back, with Nathan Ake dropping out in potentially the only change from the team that started against Tunisia.

Brobbey is expected to continue through the middle for Koeman's team, with Memphis Depay, Justin Kluivert and Crysencio Summerville on the bench.

Netherlands' midfield has been a strong point this summer, with Frenkie de Jong impressive, and the Barcelona midfielder will again feature in the XI on Monday.

There will also be spots in the side for Liverpool trio

news_items.title: Netherlands vs Morocco at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN
news_items.author: Anirudh Menon
news_items.text:
Netherlands vs Morocco at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

Netherlands face Morocco in what is one of the marquee ties of the newly introduced round of 32, and it pits two teams in fine form against each other. Both teams ended the group stage with seven points with two wins and a draw.

The Oranje were only truly tested by Japan in their group stage matches, drawing that one 2-2 before dismantling Sweden 5-1 and never slipping out of second gear in a 3-1 defeat of Tunisia.

Morocco, meanwhile, opened with a superb display, a 1-1 draw against Brazil in which they dominated for large swathes and only conceded to an individual piece of magic from Vinícius Júnior. They were then unconvincing in a 1-0 win over Scotland before they then put 4 past Haiti in an entertaining, end-to-end 4-2 win.

The winner of this match is slated to face the winner of South Africa vs. Canada in the next round, and potentially one of France or Germany in the quarterfinals.

Here's everything you need to know about the game.

## How to watch:

The match will be available on ITV1 in the UK, Fox S

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

Netherlands face Morocco in what is one of the marquee ties of the newly introduced round of 32, and it pits two teams in fine form against each other. Both teams ended the group stage with seven points with two wins and a draw.

The Oranje were only truly tested by Japan in their group stage matches, drawing that one 2-2 before dismantling Sweden 5-1 and never slipping out of second gear in a 3-1 defeat of Tunisia.

Morocco, meanwhile, opened with a superb display, a 1-1 draw against Brazil in which they dominated for large swathes and only conceded to an individual piece of magic from Vinícius Júnior. They were then unconvincing in a 1-0 win over Scotland before they then put 4 past Haiti in an entertaining, end-to-end 4-2 win.

The winner of this match is slated to face the winner of South Africa vs. Canada in the next round, and potentially one of France or Germany in the quarterfinals.

Here's everything you need to know about the game.

## How to watch:

The match will be available on ITV1 in the UK, Fox S

news_items.title: Netherlands v Morocco | World Cup Round of 32 | Match preview
news_items.text:
Netherlands v Morocco | World Cup Round of 32 | Match preview

Back

# Netherlands v Morocco: Live stream, team news, tickets and more

Published26 Jun 2026

Share

Three-time World Cup runners-up the Netherlands take on Qatar 2022 semi-finalists Morocco in this standout Round of 32 showdown.

## Netherlands v MoroccoNetherlands v Morocco

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522

### Round of 32Round of 32

Monday, 29 June | Monterrey Stadium

#### Kick-off timeKick-off time

19:00 (Monterrey) | 03:00 30 June (Amsterdam) | 02:00 30 June (Rabat)

---

### The matchThe match

The FIFA World Cup 26™ Round of 32 continues with the Netherlands taking on Morocco in Monterrey. The Oranje topped Group F after drawing with Japan and beating Sweden and Tunisia, while the Atlas Lions finished second in Group C following victories over Scotland and Haiti after an opening draw with Brazil.

The sides first met at the FIFA World Cup™ in 1994, when goals from Dennis Bergkamp and Bryan Roy earned the Netherlands a 2-1 victory in their Group F clash. Current Dutch coach Ronald Koeman started that mat

# Netherlands v Morocco: Live stream, team news, tickets and more

Published26 Jun 2026

Share

Three-time World Cup runners-up the Netherlands take on Qatar 2022 semi-finalists Morocco in this standout Round of 32 showdown.

## Netherlands v MoroccoNetherlands v Morocco

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522

### Round of 32Round of 32

Monday, 29 June | Monterrey Stadium

#### Kick-off timeKick-off time

19:00 (Monterrey) | 03:00 30 June (Amsterdam) | 02:00 30 June (Rabat)

---

### The matchThe match

The FIFA World Cup 26™ Round of 32 continues with the Netherlands taking on Morocco in Monterrey. The Oranje topped Group F after drawing with Japan and beating Sweden and Tunisia, while the Atlas Lions finished second in Group C following victories over Scotland and Haiti after an opening draw with Brazil.

The sides first met at the FIFA World Cup™ in 1994, when goals from Dennis Bergkamp and Bryan Roy earned the Netherlands a 2-1 victory in their Group F clash. Current Dutch coach Ronald Koeman started that mat

# Netherlands lineup vs. Morocco: Predicted XI for 2026 World Cup clash including double fitness boost

By Matt Law| 27 Jun 2026 18:07, Last updated: 27 Jun 2026 18:08

© Iconsport / SUSA

Netherlands will have Denzel Dumfries and Brian Brobbey available for Monday's last-32 contest at the 2026 World Cup against Morocco.

There had been suggestions that Dumfries and Brobbey were carrying slight knocks, making them potential doubts for Netherlands, but the pair have been passed fit.

Micky van de Ven is set to return to the starting team at left-back, with Nathan Ake dropping out in potentially the only change from the team that started against Tunisia.

Brobbey is expected to continue through the middle for Koeman's team, with Memphis Depay, Justin Kluivert and Crysencio Summerville on the bench.

Netherlands' midfield has been a strong point this summer, with Frenkie de Jong impressive, and the Barcelona midfielder will again feature in the XI on Monday.

There will also be spots in the side for Liverpool trio"}
{"title": "Netherlands vs Morocco at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN", "url": "https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49199529/fifa-world-cup-2026-netherlands-vs-morocco-tv-channel-how-watch-kickoff-live-stream-referee-predicted-lineups", "publishedDate": "2026-06-29T07:14:00.000Z", "author": "Anirudh Menon", "text": "Netherlands vs Morocco at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

Netherlands face Morocco in what is one of the marquee ties of the newly introduced round of 32, and it pits two teams in fine form against each other. Both teams ended the group stage with seven points with two wins and a draw.

The Oranje were only truly tested by Japan in their group stage matches, drawing that one 2-2 before dismantling Sweden 5-1 and never slipping out of second gear in a 3-1 defeat of Tunisia.

Morocco, meanwhile, opened with a superb display, a 1-1 draw against Brazil in which they dominated for large swathes and only conceded to an individual piece of magic from Vinícius Júnior. They were then unconvincing in a 1-0 win over Scotland before they then put 4 past Haiti in an entertaining, end-to-end 4-2 win.

The winner of this match is slated to face the winner of South Africa vs. Canada in the next round, and potentially one of France or Germany in the quarterfinals.

Here's everything you need to know about the game.

## How to watch:

The match will be available on ITV1 in the UK, Fox S"}

# Netherlands v Morocco: Live stream, team news, tickets and more

Published26 Jun 2026

Share

Three-time World Cup runners-up the Netherlands take on Qatar 2022 semi-finalists Morocco in this standout Round of 32 showdown.

## Netherlands v MoroccoNetherlands v Morocco

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021522

### Round of 32Round of 32

Monday, 29 June | Monterrey Stadium

#### Kick-off timeKick-off time

19:00 (Monterrey) | 03:00 30 June (Amsterdam) | 02:00 30 June (Rabat)

---

### The matchThe match

The FIFA World Cup 26™ Round of 32 continues with the Netherlands taking on Morocco in Monterrey. The Oranje topped Group F after drawing with Japan and beating Sweden and Tunisia, while the Atlas Lions finished second in Group C following victories over Scotland and Haiti after an opening draw with Brazil.

The sides first met at the FIFA World Cup™ in 1994, when goals from Dennis Bergkamp and Bryan Roy earned the Netherlands a 2-1 victory in their Group F clash. Current Dutch coach Ronald Koeman started that mat"}
